title: Frank van Berkel and Frank Bolder to attend Finnish Jazz Showcase
content:
Strong presence of Benelux programmers at the Finnish Jazz Showcase, 21–23.4 in Espoo, Finland.

The post Frank van Berkel and Frank Bolder to attend Finnish Jazz Showcase appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: Save the date: Terike Haapoja at Paleis Het Loo
content:
